curation_notes: The patch commit adds hostname validation to pkg/nuclide-hhvm/lib/main.js in the _debugDeepWithHhvm function. Only one source file was changed. The location was derived from the patch diff, which shows the fix adds a regex check for invalid hostname characters (per RFC 952) before the hostname is used in UI rendering. The advisory explicitly names the hhvm-attach deep link handler as the vulnerable component.
